## Safety checklist (required for firmware/hardware changes)
- [ ] Simulation run completed and logs attached
- [ ] Motors remain disabled by default on boot
- [ ] EN pins controlled only by safety task
- [ ] Heartbeat timeout tested (default ~500 ms)
- [ ] Wiring/docs updated if hardware changed
